flat_prompt: OPENING HOOK (3s): bold on-screen text reads "Stop wasting time on outdated website redesigns!" — eye-catching, high contrast, centered on screen. Scene visuals: Fast-paced montage: old, cluttered website UI transforming into a sleek, modern, mobile-responsive design. Text overlay: 'Before' and 'After' with a dynamic transition.. Voiceover: Female voice, confident tone, speaking in Egyptian Arabic: "Imagine your website, but faster, smarter, and stunningly redesigned in minutes with AI.". Brand color None used in video.  Pacing: medium. Transitions: cut. Vertical 9:16 format, professional social-media production quality.

scene_visuals.description: Fast-paced montage: old, cluttered website UI transforming into a sleek, modern, mobile-responsive design. Text overlay: 'Before' and 'After' with a dynamic transition.
